title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Log out - Continue
scenario: Account login/logout flow verification in Poly Studio Mobile App Settings > General
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app as a guest user.
2. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
4. Tap 'Continue' and log in with valid credentials.
5. Verify that the 'Your account' text is displayed with Name and Email fields populated.
7. Verify that a login dialog opens with 'Cancel' and 'Continue' options.
9. Verify that the user is logged out.
10. Verify that the 'Your account' text shows 'You aren't currently logged in'.
11. Verify that the 'Log in' button is visible.
expected: After logging in, 'Your account' text appears with Name and Email fields populated. After tapping Log out and confirming with Continue, the user is logged out, 'Your account' shows 'You aren't currently logged in', and the Log in button is visible.
